entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The crop species Cicer arietinum L. being studied for cold tolerance.

entities.name: COLD TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand cold temperatures.

entities.name: COLD SUSCEPTIBILITY
entities.description: The lack of tolerance to cold temperatures in the plant.

entities.name: COMBINING ABILITY ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to investigate gene action and breeding value.

entities.name: GENERATION MEAN ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to analyze the means of different generations to identify gene effects.

entities.name: ADDITIVE GENE EFFECTS
entities.description: The cumulative effect of alleles at a locus contributing to a trait.

entities.name: NONADDITIVE GENE EFFECTS
entities.description: Gene effects that are not additive, including dominance and epistasis.

entities.name: GENE INTERACTIONS
entities.description: The interaction between alleles at different loci, also known as epistasis.

entities.name: DOMINANCE GENE EFFECTS
entities.description: The effect where one allele masks the expression of another allele at the same locus.

entities.name: ADDITIVE X ADDITIVE INTERACTION
entities.description: A specific type of epistatic interaction between additive gene effects.

entities.name: DOMINANCE X DOMINANCE INTERACTION
entities.description: A specific type of epistatic interaction between dominance gene effects.

entities.name: DUPLICATE EPISTASIS
entities.description: A form of gene interaction where two different genes produce the same phenotypic effect.

entities.name: SELFING
entities.description: The process of self-pollination used to reduce non-additive genetic variance.
